title: RequestProposed
description: Published by Dispatch Core when it selects and proposes a professional for a request (FSM transition: queued -> proposed). Notification Gateway pushes this to the professional's client.

pro_id.description: ID of the professional being proposed, from Pro Registry.

strategy.description: Which matching strategy produced this proposal, so Evaluation can attribute outcomes to a strategy. S1/S2 = classic tag-based matching, S3/S4 = semantic embedding-based matching.

match_score.description: Cosine similarity or ranking score behind this choice, if the strategy produces one (null for purely rule-based strategies).

expires_at.description: Deadline by which the pro must respond before Dispatch Core times the proposal out and tries the next candidate.
